title: mimulus guttatus subsp. typicus
intro: Mimulus guttatus subsp. typicus is a subspecies of the yellow monkey flower plant, native to North America and known for its bright yellow flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, stress, and nervous disorders, due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Mimulus guttatus subsp. typicus include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related conditions. Herbal preparations of Mimulus guttatus subsp. typicus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
